name: job_report_workflow:ENTITY_MODEL_VAR:ENTITY_VERSION_VAR:CHAT_ID_VAR
description: Workflow for processing job report: fetch conversion rates and send email notification

transitions.name: fetch_conversion_rates
transitions.description: Fetch conversion rates using the Binance API

externalized_processors.name: process_fetch_conversion_rates
externalized_processors.description: Fetch the BTC/USD and BTC/EUR conversion rates

transitions.name: send_email
transitions.description: Send email notification with fetched conversion rates
transitions.end_state_description: Job report completed with email sent (or error noted)

externalized_processors.name: process_send_email
externalized_processors.description: Send email notification to the recipient
